channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Israel and Lebanon begin tense 10-day ceasefire
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agreed to the 10-day ceasefire, but Israel vowed to keep its forces in southern Lebanon, saying it would attack if threatened by Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Lebanon agreed to the 10-day ceasefire, but Israel vowed to keep its forces in southern Lebanon, saying it would attack if threatened by Hezbollah.
item.dc:creator: Kat Lonsdorf

item.title: Carnegie Middle East Center director on fragile ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon
item.description: The historic ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon reveals a shifting role for Hezbollah in the decades-long war. NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Maha Yahya of the Carnegie Middle East Center.
item.content:encoded: The historic ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon reveals a shifting role for Hezbollah in the decades-long war. NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Maha Yahya of the Carnegie Middle East Center.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Human rights groups raise alarm over fate of Salvadorans deported from U.S.
item.description: Migrants deported from the U.S. routinely disappear into El Salvador's prisons the moment they land or in the weeks that follow. Many remain incommunicado from family and lawyers for years.
item.content:encoded:
Migrants deported from the U.S. routinely disappear into El Salvador's prisons the moment they land or in the weeks that follow. Many remain incommunicado from family and lawyers for years.

(Image credit: Illustration by Jackie Lay/NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, U.S. military officials say the blockade of Iranian ports and ceasefire is holding, Trump nominates former Coast Guard doctor as CDC chief.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, U.S. military officials say the blockade of Iranian ports and ceasefire is holding, Trump nominates former Coast Guard doctor as CDC chief.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: 'Lorne' offers a rare glimpse of the creator of 'Saturday Night Live'
item.description: A Martinez speaks with Morgan Neville about his new documentary about the creator of "Saturday Night Live," and how he persuaded the reclusive Lorne Michaels to consent.
item.content:encoded: A Martinez speaks with Morgan Neville about his new documentary about the creator of "Saturday Night Live," and how he persuaded the reclusive Lorne Michaels to consent.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: White House seeks record defense budget, but Congress has questions about spending
item.description: The White House is seeking $1.5 trillion from Congress for the Pentagon and is expected to send a separate ask for the Iran war. Lawmakers want more transparency around how the money will be spent.
item.content:encoded: The White House is seeking $1.5 trillion from Congress for the Pentagon and is expected to send a separate ask for the Iran war. Lawmakers want more transparency around how the money will be spent.
item.dc:creator: Claudia Grisales

item.title: In China, swapping out an EV battery is as fast as filling up a gas tank
item.description: In China, some EV owners have the option to swap out a low battery for a fully charged one, instead of waiting at a charging station. The whole process only takes about three minutes.
item.content:encoded: In China, some EV owners have the option to swap out a low battery for a fully charged one, instead of waiting at a charging station. The whole process only takes about three minutes.
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Mejia wins NJ special election to replace Gov. Sherrill in Congress
item.description: Democrat Analilia Mejía won a special election Thursday to fill the House seat vacated by Democratic Gov. Mikie Sherrill.
item.content:encoded: Democrat Analilia Mejía won a special election Thursday to fill the House seat vacated by Democratic Gov. Mikie Sherrill.
item.dc:creator: Mike Hayes

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire appears to hold as economic pressure builds globally
item.description: U.S. military officials say the blockade of Iranian ports is holding and so is a ceasefire in the war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: U.S. military officials say the blockade of Iranian ports is holding and so is a ceasefire in the war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence

item.title: Former Defense Secretary Leon Panetta on the Iran war and Hegseth's performance
item.description: In an interview with NPR's A Martinez, former Secretary of Defense Leon Panetta reviews current Secretary Pete Hegseth's wartime job performance.
item.content:encoded: In an interview with NPR's A Martinez, former Secretary of Defense Leon Panetta reviews current Secretary Pete Hegseth's wartime job performance.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez
